speaker: speaker1
text: my lease ends next month , so I have to find a new place .

speaker: speaker2
text: I feel sorry for you . It's a jungle out there .

speaker: speaker2
text: well . I guess I can ask around to see if anyone's got a room or apartment available .

speaker: speaker1
text: thank you . I think I should also have a look at the Internet to see if anyone's got a sublet .

speaker: speaker2
text: how much do are you looking to spend ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I can only afford about 1,000 yuan a month .

speaker: speaker2
text: looks like you'll have to get a place in the suburbs .

speaker: speaker1
text: it doesn't matter , but it needs to be close to the subway or on a convenient bus route .

speaker: speaker2
text: anything you need to have in the place ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want a bedroom with full bath , and it'll be better if the bedroom is on the sunny side .

speaker: speaker2
text: you can also check out university bulletin boards .

speaker: speaker1
text: why ? Will those be students who are leaving ?

speaker: speaker2
text: not really , but landlords put up notices to attract students and they often have low rent .

speaker: speaker1
text: thank you . I'll be sure to take a look .
